intent.summary: Ship Rubrix v1.1.0 — Intent Elicitation & Depth Calibration
intent.details: Replace one-line intent.summary with depth-calibrated brief; add /rubrix:brief skill, brief-interviewer agent, PreToolUse gate, and axis_depth floor in scoring. State machine unchanged; intent.summary deprecated-but-preserved.

criteria.description: cli/schemas/rubrix.schema.json accepts intent.brief and rubric.criteria[].axis additively; v1.0 fixtures (examples/self-eval, examples/ios-refactor) keep validating clean; enum violations on brief or axis fail validation.

rubrix brief init produces a calibrated IntentDrafted contract; rubrix brief get --axis prints effective depth (skip env, demo short-circuit, per-axis); rubrix validate warns on uncalibrated >= RubricDrafted but does not fail.
rubrix gate raises effective floor of every criterion mapped to a deep axis to max(criterion.floor ?? 0, 0.7); other axes unchanged from v1.0 behavior.
skills/brief/SKILL.md and agents/brief-interviewer.md exist with valid frontmatter and JSON-only output contract; .claude-plugin/plugin.json registers the new agent.
PreToolUse hook returns hookSpecificOutput.permissionDecision=deny + exit 0 + stderr message when /rubrix:rubric is invoked while intent.brief.calibrated !== true and RUBRIX_SKIP_BRIEF !== '1'.

v1.0 contracts (no intent.brief) keep loading, validating, gating, and reporting unchanged; RUBRIX_SKIP_BRIEF=1 bypasses the PreToolUse gate and forces all-standard axis depth fallback (deterministic).
The repo-root rubrix.json reaches state=Passed via rubrix gate --apply at the end of PR #3, demonstrating that v1.1 evaluates itself successfully.

Release artifacts are clean: no .rubrix/, reports/, transcripts, or per-run evidence committed to repo. Per-run evidence ships only as a GitHub Release asset (evidence-bundle.tar.gz with SHA-256 in annotated tag).

rows.evidence_required: AJV validation of new intent.brief object and rubric.criteria[].axis enum on (a) repo-root rubrix.json, (b) examples/self-eval/rubrix.json (v1.0 fixture, no brief), (c) examples/ios-refactor/rubrix.json (v1.0 Passed fixture). Negative tests: brief.calibrated missing → fail; axis_depth.security='extreme' → fail; criteria.axis='moonshine' → fail.

rubrix brief init creates fresh IntentDrafted contract; idempotent re-init on IntentDrafted; refuses past IntentDrafted (exit 3); enum violations on flags exit 1; rubrix brief get --axis prints effective depth resolved by skip-env / demo / per-axis; validate warning text includes 'RUBRIX_SKIP_BRIEF=1' when env is set.

Test fixture: contract with brief.axis_depth.security='deep' and criterion {axis:'security', score:0.6, floor:undefined} → gate returns Fail; same fixture with axis_depth.security='standard' → Pass. ambition='demo' overrides every axis to light. Effective floor formula = max(criterion.floor ?? 0, 0.7) only when resolved depth='deep'.

skills/brief/SKILL.md exists with frontmatter {name: brief, description: ...}; agents/brief-interviewer.md exists with frontmatter {name: brief-interviewer, tools: Read} and JSON-only output contract enumerating exact enum values; .claude-plugin/plugin.json agents array includes ./agents/brief-interviewer.md.
rows.verify: manual review + ls + claude plugin validate .

rows.evidence_required: Hook stdin fixture: tool_name='SlashCommand', prompt='/rubrix:rubric', contract has intent.brief.calibrated=false → stdout JSON has hookSpecificOutput.permissionDecision='deny', exit code 0, stderr message references /rubrix:brief. Same fixture with env RUBRIX_SKIP_BRIEF=1 → permissionDecision='allow'. brief calibrated=true → allow.

examples/self-eval/rubrix.json and examples/ios-refactor/rubrix.json validate without errors at every state (warning only, never fail). rubrix gate on v1.0 contract uses standard floor (no axis bump) regardless of brief absence. RUBRIX_SKIP_BRIEF=1 path tested via env-injected fixture.

Repo-root rubrix.json reaches state='Passed' on the PR #3 merge commit. Achieved by recording scores >= floor for every criterion, then rubrix gate ./rubrix.json --apply transitioning Scoring → Passed atomically.

git ls-files on main branch HEAD after v1.1.0 tag shows zero matches for: .rubrix/, reports/, *.log, iteration-*/, codex-review-*.md. v1.1.0 annotated tag message contains the SHA-256 of the evidence-bundle.tar.gz attached to the GitHub Release.
rows.verify: git ls-files | rg '^(\.rubrix|reports|iteration-)' && git tag -v v1.1.0

steps.action: Implement intent.brief schema, rubric.criteria[].axis enum, rubrix brief init/get CLI, validate brief warning, and 26 new tests; bootstrap repo-root rubrix.json/requirements.md/plan.json via the new CLI.
Add skills/brief/SKILL.md and agents/brief-interviewer.md, register agent in plugin.json, update README/PLUGIN-README, and walk root rubrix.json through RubricDrafted → MatrixLocked via CLI.
steps.produces: PR #17 — feat(v1.1): /rubrix:brief skill + agent + dogfood lifecycle (RUB-16)

steps.action: Add PreToolUse /rubrix:rubric brief gate (RUBRIX_SKIP_BRIEF=1 override), axis-depth deep floor in rubrix gate (effective floor = max(floor ?? 0, 0.7)), Intent brief block in rubrix report, version bump to 1.1.0, and 23 new tests. Walk root rubrix.json from PlanDrafted → Passed via rubrix gate --apply.
steps.produces: PR (TBD) — feat(v1.1): hook gate + axis floor + report + version + dogfood Passed (RUB-17)

scores.notes: 26 brief.test.ts assertions pass; v1.0 fixtures (self-eval, ios-refactor) keep validating clean; enum violations on intent.brief and rubric.criteria[].axis fail. additionalProperties:false preserved on intent.

rubrix brief init creates fresh contract or upgrades IntentDrafted; refuses past IntentDrafted (exit 3); enum violations exit 1; rubrix brief get --axis returns effective depth; validate emits warning at >=RubricDrafted with RUBRIX_SKIP_BRIEF=1 annotation when set.

axis-depth-floor.test.ts (7 tests) covers deep→bump, standard→no bump, demo short-circuit, RUBRIX_SKIP_BRIEF=1 fallback, explicit higher base floor preserved, untagged criterion immune, uncalibrated brief→standard fallback.
skills/brief/SKILL.md and agents/brief-interviewer.md exist with valid frontmatter; agent enumerates every accepted enum value; .claude-plugin/plugin.json includes ./agents/brief-interviewer.md.

hook-brief-gate.test.ts (9 tests) covers deny on /rubrix:rubric when uncalibrated, allow when calibrated, allow with RUBRIX_SKIP_BRIEF=1, alternate triggers (/rubric, rubric, /rubric foo), no interference with /rubrix:score path, UserPromptExpansion <rubrix-suggestion> append/skip semantics.

integration/brief-bootstrap.test.ts (7 tests) confirms v1.0 fixtures validate, gate behaviour identical with and without RUBRIX_SKIP_BRIEF=1, no Intent brief section in report when contract lacks brief; manual rubrix validate examples/* passes.

Repo-root rubrix.json walked through CLI: IntentDrafted (PR #1) → RubricDrafted/Locked + MatrixLocked (PR #2) → PlanLocked + Scoring (PR #3) → Passed via rubrix gate ./rubrix.json --apply (this commit).

git ls-files HEAD shows no .rubrix/, reports/, iteration-*, codex-review-*, transcript-*. .gitignore enforces these patterns. Per-run evidence (transcripts, hook events) ships only as evidence-bundle.tar.gz attached to the v1.1.0 GitHub Release with SHA-256 in the annotated tag message.
